subject: Urban watch: kangaroos and koalas positioning around Auckland | Albert Einstein | Q4 review | INIT-3245
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of labrador work in Auckland. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Reference profile: Albert Einstein. Reference initiative INIT-3245. Maintain discretion until the kangaroo, koala, and drop bear urban encroachment assessment is complete. Tracking tags: quality, quality.
